backend/main.mo: Main backend actor that includes blob storage and authorization mixins, defines all data types (vehicles, variants, colors, images, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media assets, visitor stats, sessions, etc.) and manages state for access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features for replacing generic car icon thumbnails with actual image thumbnails in MediaAssetGrid by implementing proper blob URL generation utilities.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for both public and admin sections of the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership application.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content truncated or not present).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring React Router with public routes (home, vehicles, promos, blog, contact, credit simulation) and protected admin routes with AuthGuard, plus QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (for new users only), using mutations for create/update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with email, name, role badge, and action buttons for edit/delete, with protection preventing deletion of the last admin user.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets, filtering images with 'banner' in filename and displaying them in a radio-group grid with dimension recommendations for main or CTA banners.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Dialog form for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, includes delegation identity validation to check token expiration before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, includes confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid display of media assets with thumbnails for images, icons for PDFs, and actions to copy asset ID or delete, handles image load errors gracefully.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: File upload component with drag-and-drop support, validates file types (images and PDFs) and sizes, checks delegation token validity before upload, and shows progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog form for creating and editing passenger vehicles with fields for name, description, and base price, handles both create and update operations.
Displays a table of passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Modal dialog form for creating or editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps.
Displays a table of promotions with edit, delete, and active status toggle actions. Shows promotion period dates and includes loading states and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Modal dialog form for creating or editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range before submission.
Displays a table of testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating with edit and delete action buttons. Includes loading skeleton and empty state.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts. Truncates long URLs for display and converts bigint view counts to numbers.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Displays a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. Converts bigint timestamp data to formatted chart data sorted chronologically.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if authentication is invalid or expired.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Renders a list of 5 hardcoded article links with titles and slugs, navigating to blog detail pages on click. Displays articles in a card layout with FileText icons.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with 4 CTA buttons (Call, WhatsApp, Simulasi, Menu) and a dropdown menu for site navigation. Includes click-outside detection to close the menu.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Provides variant selection UI for commercial vehicles using button toggles. Manages selected variant state and notifies parent component of selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image fetched from media assets API with fallback to static generated image. Shows loading skeleton while fetching and handles image load errors.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with 4-column layout showing logo, contact info, social media links, and visitor statistics. Fetches and displays real-time visitor stats with auto-refresh every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, and subtexts based on current pathname. Adjusts text color for Mobil Niaga pages (black) vs other pages (white).
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel section displaying up to 8 family vehicles from the catalog API. Uses VehicleCard components within a responsive carousel with navigation controls.
Carousel section displaying up to 8 commercial vehicles from the catalog API. Similar to HighlightMobilKeluarga but with yellow theme color for commercial vehicles.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Displays main banner image fetched from media assets API with fallback to static generated image. Shows loading skeleton and handles image load errors with 1920x600 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar component with mobile menu support, featuring Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang branding and links to main site sections (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Testimoni, Blog, Kontak).
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Component displaying like and share buttons for vehicle products, integrating with useProductInteractions hook and native Web Share API.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Featured products section that displays the first 4 vehicle catalogs in a responsive grid using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Product search section with input field and search button that redirects to mobil-keluarga page with query parameter.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three key dealership benefits: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: About Us section displaying static content describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership and its services.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component for choosing vehicle variants and colors, managing selection state and notifying parent via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language translations for labels, validation messages, and system messages used throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing Internet Computer actor creation with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states, and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, blog posts, visitors); currently returns default zeros as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Hooks for admin user CRUD operations (get all, get one, create, update) with error handling for auth/network issues; backend methods not yet implemented so returns empty/null data.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete) with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations. All methods are stubbed with console warnings as backend implementation is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data. Backend method is not implemented, currently logs a warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions. Returns empty array as backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data. Backend method is not implemented, currently logs a warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations. Returns empty array as backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for media asset operations including fetching all assets, getting by ID, and uploading with progress tracking. Includes authentication and network error handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides hooks for product like/share functionality including count queries and mutation actions. All backend methods are stubbed and return default values.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for promotion CRUD operations with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching vehicle catalog data (all catalogs and individual vehicle with catalog), currently returning empty/null as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a React Query hook for fetching website settings, currently returning null as the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials with error handling for auth/network errors and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed and return empty/dummy data.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations with enhanced error classification (auth, network) and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed returning empty/null data.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views; only getVisitorStats is implemented and enabled, others are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that is now handled by PublicLayout; kept for backward compatibility but does nothing.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with error handling and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin dashboard layout with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile behavior, menu items for all admin sections, and logout functionality that clears auth state.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes navbar, optional hero section, footer, and bottom CTA bar; implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs and device detection.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
Admin users management page that displays a list of admin users with add, edit, and delete functionality using dialogs and mutations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog management page that displays blog posts list with add/edit functionality via dialog and invalidates cache on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a table of credit simulations submitted by visitors, sorted by timestamp with vehicle ID, amount, and tenor details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and visitors using icons and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a table of contact form submissions (leads) sorted by timestamp with name, email, message, and date columns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Passenger vehicles management page with list view and dialog for adding/editing vehicles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Promotions management page with list view and dialog for adding/editing promotional content.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Testimonials management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete confirmation alert dialog using mutations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard page displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, showing metrics like total visitors, daily/weekly/monthly counts, online users, and page views. Includes trend charts and top pages visualization using custom hooks and UI components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for managing website settings including site name, contact information, social media URLs, and banner images. Uses form state management with hooks for fetching and updating settings data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that handles Internet Identity authentication, displays login UI with loading states, and redirects authenticated users to admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple sections including main banner, vehicle highlights (family and commercial), CTA banner, about section, special features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing a development message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing a development message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Contact page with a form for customer inquiries including personal details, vehicle interest, down payment, and tenor information. Submits data via contact form hook and displays contact information.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Family vehicle detail page showing vehicle information, pricing, variant/color selection, specifications, and features. Includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales and credit simulation.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Family vehicles listing page displaying up to 8 published vehicle catalogs in a grid layout using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Commercial vehicles category page displaying vehicles filtered by category parameter, showing up to 8 catalogs in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Commercial vehicle detail page similar to family vehicle detail but uses CommercialVariantSelector instead of color selection, showing specifications, features, and interaction options.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays a grid of three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page showing a 'under development' message for promotions, directing users to contact sales for current offers.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that allows users to select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, calculates estimated monthly installments, and submits the simulation request.
Placeholder page showing a 'under development' message for customer testimonials.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all domain entities (Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, CommercialVehicleCategory) matching backend types.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Provides utility functions to construct blob URLs from asset IDs and determine asset types (image, PDF) based on MIME types.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using a fixed 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions for managing parameters across navigation.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for common form inputs including required fields, email, phone, length constraints, numeric values, and URLs.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Implements visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/retrieval, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a media manager and website settings application with known issues around image thumbnail display and persistence. Contains two pending feature requests to fix image display in media manager and website settings components.
